# Text Elements

EAGLE Document Generation Pipeline ^title-main

Supervisor → create_document → S3 → Document Card ^title-sub

USER ^lbl-user

Contracting Officer ^lbl-user-sub

"Generate a SOW for cloud migration" ^lbl-user-msg

Next.js Frontend ^lbl-frontend

simple-chat-interface.tsx ^lbl-frontend-sub

POST /api/chat ^lbl-post-chat

FastAPI Backend ^lbl-fastapi

streaming_routes.py ^lbl-fastapi-sub

sdk_query() ^lbl-sdk-query

Supervisor Agent ^lbl-supervisor

strands_agentic_service.py ^lbl-supervisor-sub

BedrockModel | claude-sonnet-4-6 ^lbl-supervisor-model

CONTEXT INJECTED AT RUNTIME ^lbl-ctx-title

Tenant: nci-tenant | User: jane.doe ^lbl-ctx-1

Tier: advanced | Datetime: 2026-03-18T00:56:19 UTC ^lbl-ctx-2

Active Skills: oa-intake | doc-generator | compliance ^lbl-ctx-3

Document Output Rules: MUST call create_document ^lbl-ctx-4

Section Guidance: SOW: 1.BACKGROUND | 2.SCOPE | ... ^lbl-ctx-5

create_document Tool ^lbl-tool

Supervisor calls tool with: ^lbl-tool-sub

doc_type: "sow" ^lbl-tool-arg1

title: "Cloud Migration SOW" ^lbl-tool-arg2

content: "# SOW\n## 1. BACKGROUND..." ^lbl-tool-arg3

data: {description, estimated_value, ...} ^lbl-tool-arg4

TemplateSchema ^lbl-schema

Validates completeness ^lbl-schema-sub

CompletenessReport: 93% filled ^lbl-schema-detail

TemplateService ^lbl-tmplsvc

S3 template → fallback: markdown ^lbl-tmplsvc-sub

docx | xlsx | md ^lbl-tmplsvc-formats

S3 Bucket ^lbl-s3

eagle-documents-695681773636-dev ^lbl-s3-sub

s3://bucket/sow-cloud-migration-v1.docx ^lbl-s3-key

Document Card ^lbl-doccard

Frontend renders download link ^lbl-doccard-sub

SOW | IGCE | J&A | AP | Market Research ^lbl-doccard-types

PROMPT EXAMPLES ^lbl-prompts-title

1. "Draft a SOW for IT help desk support, 12 months, $500K estimated" ^lbl-p1

2. "Create an IGCE for the cloud migration project we discussed" ^lbl-p2

3. "Generate a J&A — sole source, Oracle is the only vendor, FAR 6.302-1" ^lbl-p3

4. "Write a market research report for cybersecurity monitoring services" ^lbl-p4

5. "Create an acquisition plan for the data analytics platform, full and open competition" ^lbl-p5

SYSTEM PROMPT STRUCTURE ^lbl-sysprompt-title

Tenant: nci-tenant | User: jane.doe | Tier: advanced ^lbl-sp1

Current datetime: 2026-03-18T00:56:19 UTC ^lbl-sp2

[Supervisor Agent Prompt] ^lbl-sp3

--- ACTIVE SPECIALISTS --- ^lbl-sp4

legal-counsel | market-intelligence | policy-analyst ^lbl-sp5

Document Output Rules: ^lbl-sp6

1) MUST call create_document ^lbl-sp7

1a) Write COMPLETE content as markdown ^lbl-sp8

1d) SECTION GUIDANCE: ^lbl-sp9

SOW: 1.BACKGROUND | 2.SCOPE | 3.PERIOD | ... ^lbl-sp10

IGCE: 1.PURPOSE | 2.METHODOLOGY | 3.COST BREAKDOWN ^lbl-sp11

AP: 1.BACKGROUND & OBJECTIVES | 2.PLAN OF ACTION ^lbl-sp12

FAST vs DEEP routing rules ^lbl-sp13

create_document call ^lbl-arr-tool-lbl

validates ^lbl-arr-schema-lbl

tries S3 template ^lbl-arr-s3tmpl-lbl

s3://bucket/key.docx ^lbl-arr-s3key-lbl

Document Card response ^lbl-arr-doccard-lbl
